title: Services
description: DES Engineering Services offers comprehensive EC&I services including cable tray installation, cable pulling, glanding and termination, loop check, calibration, inspection, operation support, and maintenance.

services.title: Cable Tray Installation
services.description: Professional cable tray installation services for industrial and commercial projects in Hong Kong.

services.title: Cable Pulling
services.description: Expert cable pulling services for power, control, and instrumentation cables in Hong Kong.

services.title: Glanding and Termination
services.description: Professional cable glanding and termination services for power and instrumentation cables in Hong Kong.

services.title: Loop Check / Pre-Commissioning
services.description: Comprehensive loop check and pre-commissioning services for electrical and instrumentation systems in Hong Kong.

services.title: Instrument Configuration / Calibration
services.description: Professional instrument configuration and calibration services for process instrumentation in Hong Kong.

services.title: Inspection
services.description: Comprehensive inspection services for electrical and instrumentation systems in Hong Kong.

services.title: Operation Support

services.title: Maintenance
